head.name: Head
head.description: Helmets and headgear can have batting, pitching, or luck affixes

body.name: Body
body.description: Jerseys and chest gear can have batting, pitching, or defense affixes

hands.name: Hands
hands.description: Gloves and batting gloves can have batting, baserunning, or defense affixes

feet.name: Feet
feet.description: Cleats can have baserunning, defense, or luck affixes

accessory.name: Accessory
accessory.description: Accessories have specific allowed attributes only

pitcher.reasoning: Pitchers benefit most from head and body items with pitching affixes

power_hitter.reasoning: Power hitters want batting affixes on head and hands for muscle/lift

speedster.reasoning: Speed-focused players want baserunning affixes on hands and feet

defender.reasoning: Defensive specialists want defense affixes across body/hands/feet
